case_title: FINCH, WENDELL F., AKA W. FRANK FINCH vs. EASLEY, BILL et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT EASLEY, BILL
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT EASLEY, BILL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EASLEY, BILL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 746 CLEMENTINA STREET #1, SAN FRANCISCO $900.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00, STAYED UNTIL OCT-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT EXEC STAYED TO 10-31-95. DFT TO PAY $900 DMGS IN PMNTS STARTING 8/1/95 IN AMT OF $450 PER MO. IF DFT IS MORE THAN 5 DAYS DELINQUENT, PLTF MAY APPLY EX- PARTE TO LIFT STAY & FOR UNPAID MONIES DUE. NO FURT STAYS. SEC DEPOSIT IF ANY RETAINED BY PLTF. RELEASE ALL CLAIMS.
